name: Tomatillo and Corn Soup- Cafe' Zelo in Corva
recipeIngredient: 3 packages (10 ounces each) fresh corn kernels, thawed
4 cups chicken stock or canned low-salt broth
1/4 cup packed thawed frozen chopped spinach
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add onion and sauté until softened.
3. Stir in garlic and cook for an additional 30 seconds.
4. Add tomatillos, corn kernels, broth, peas, cilantro, green chilies, and spinach.
5. Simmer the soup for about 20 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
6. Season with sugar and remove from heat.
7. Adjust salt levels as needed.
